_comment: Local DetectGPT config: N=10 perturbations + small scoring/mask models so the run fits an 8 GB consumer GPU in a few hours. Paper-grade is GPT-Neo-2.7B + t5-large + N=100 (see baselines_paper_faithful.json). Per Mitchell et al. 2023, N=10 is ~3-5 pp AUROC below N=100; the paper-grade config supersedes this where a larger GPU is available.
